name: Lakewood Farmers' Market

Products.value: Fresh produce and goods from local farmers, vendors, and artisans

notes: On-file website (denverfarmersmarket.com) is confirmed correct and official - it's the 'Metro Denver Farmers Market' operator site running 4 locations (Sterling Ranch, Southwest Plaza, Lakewood, Highlands Ranch). The Lakewood market is at 9077 W Alameda Ave (Alameda & Garrison, at Mile Hi Church), Saturdays, hours listed as '10am-2pm or until sellout' (used listed start/end times; sellout caveat omitted from Hours field). Season listed as June 13 - October 3 (year not specified on site, likely current/upcoming season), converted to month list. On-file Facebook URL confirmed matching the link on the official site. No SNAP/EBT, ADA accessibility, or certified organic information found anywhere on the site - omitted rather than guessed. No dedicated Instagram/Facebook page specific to the Lakewood location alone; these are shared across all 4 Metro Denver Farmers Market locations. Address on file (9077 W Alameda Ave) matches site exactly, so not changed.
